title: erigeron leptocladus
intro: Erigeron leptocladus, also known as smallflower fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Erigeron leptocladus include its ability to aid in the healing of cuts and scrapes, reduce fever, and ease digestive issues. Erigeron leptocladus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and it is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
